payload.title: Per-rule config file — trust.toml / [package.metadata.trust] rule selection + project allows
payload.description: Reviewer had to (or would have to) sprinkle 162 inline `#[allow(trust::R0042, reason=…)]`. Need per-rule enable/disable/severity in trust.toml or [package.metadata.trust], plus project-level allows, so suppression isn't per-callsite. Today: only `strict = true` (cargo-trustc/src/main.rs:250-267) and inline allow (crates/trust-lints/src/allow.rs). Builds on the decouple ticket — the config is how you select the subset persistently. Honor it in both `trust check` and `cargo trustc`.
